title: July 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 26''' is the 207th day (208th in leap years) of the year, with 158 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1972]] – [[Spencer Wilding]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 25|''Star Wars Weekly'' 25]] published.
*[[1982]] – ''[[The Power Gem]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 20|''Star Wars'' (1998) 20]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 9: Endgame]]'' published.
*2006 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' novelization]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars Insider 127|''Star Wars Insider'' 127]] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.36]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Celebration Europe II]] begins in Essen, Germany.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars]]'' airs on [[Disney Channel]] and [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – ''[[The Force Awakens Mask Book]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Princess]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Jedi Academy: A New Class]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Insider 167|''Star Wars Insider'' 167]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Padawan (novel)|''Padawan'']] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader – Black, White & Red 4|''Darth Vader – Black, White & Red'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 6|''Hyperspace Stories'' 6]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 2|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 2]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Nubs Can't Stop Sneezing]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
